docs: Create a new PSP37 multi-token contract
constructors.label: new

docs: Emitted when a per-token-ID allowance is set (GEM-05-C02)
events.label: Approval

docs: Emitted when burn approval is granted or revoked (GEM-05-H03)
events.label: BurnApproval

docs: Emitted on ownership transfer (GEM-05-M04)
events.label: OwnershipTransferred

docs: Emitted on code hash upgrade (GEM-05-M03)
events.label: CodeHashUpdated

docs: Get balance of account for specific token
messages.label: balance_of

docs: Get balances for multiple token IDs (batch operation)
messages.label: balance_of_batch

docs: Transfer tokens from caller to another account
messages.label: transfer

docs: Transfer tokens from one account to another (requires per-token allowance or operator approval)
messages.label: transfer_from

docs: Batch transfer multiple tokens at once (gas efficient, capped at MAX_BATCH_SIZE)
messages.label: batch_transfer

docs: Batch transfer from another account (requires approval, capped at MAX_BATCH_SIZE)
messages.label: batch_transfer_from

docs: Approve or revoke operator to manage ALL tokens of caller (blanket approval)
messages.label: set_approval_for_all

docs: Approve a specific allowance for an operator on a specific token ID.
Set value to 0 to revoke. This does NOT grant burn rights — use
`set_burn_approval` separately.
messages.label: approve

docs: Query the per-token allowance for an operator
messages.label: allowance

docs: Check if operator is approved for all tokens of owner (blanket approval)
messages.label: is_approved_for_all

docs: Approve or revoke an operator's right to burn caller's tokens (GEM-05-H03).
This is separate from transfer approval.
messages.label: set_burn_approval

docs: Check if operator is approved to burn owner's tokens
messages.label: is_burn_approved

docs: Get total supply of a specific token
messages.label: total_supply

docs: Get token URI (metadata link)
messages.label: token_uri

docs: Get the token type (Fungible or NonFungible). Returns None if token doesn't exist.
messages.label: token_type

docs: Get the maximum supply cap for a token. Returns None if no cap is set.
NonFungible tokens always have an implicit cap of 1.
messages.label: get_max_supply

docs: Create a new token type and mint initial supply (owner only).
`token_type` — Fungible or NonFungible. Immutable after creation.
`max_supply_cap` — Optional maximum supply for fungible tokens. Ignored for
NonFungible tokens (always capped at 1). None = no cap.
`initial_supply` — For NonFungible, must be 0 or 1.
`uri` — Optional metadata URI.
messages.label: create_token

docs: Mint additional tokens of an existing type (owner only).
Token must have been created via `create_token`. (GEM-05-C03)
messages.label: mint

docs: Batch mint multiple tokens (owner only, capped at MAX_BATCH_SIZE)
messages.label: batch_mint

docs: Burn tokens (reduce supply) — self-burn only
messages.label: burn

docs: Burn tokens from another account.
Requires BURN approval (set_burn_approval), NOT transfer approval. (GEM-05-H03)
messages.label: burn_from

docs: Get contract owner
messages.label: owner

docs: Get the pending owner (if a two-step transfer is in progress)
messages.label: pending_owner

docs: Upgrades the contract code hash (owner only).
Emits CodeHashUpdated event for off-chain monitoring. (GEM-05-M03)
messages.label: set_code_hash

docs: Propose ownership transfer (owner only). Two-step: new_owner must
call `accept_ownership` to complete. (GEM-05-M02)
messages.label: transfer_ownership

docs: Accept a pending ownership transfer. Must be called by the pending owner. (GEM-05-M02)
messages.label: accept_ownership

docs: Cancel a pending ownership transfer (owner only)
messages.label: cancel_ownership_transfer

docs: Set token URI (owner only)
messages.label: set_token_uri
